g.onclick: sendPrompt('/think: challenges the problem, pressure-tests the design, validates architecture before code')
sendPrompt('/ui: distinctive UI with committed aesthetic direction, no generic AI aesthetics')
sendPrompt('/hunt: systematic debugging, root cause confirmed before any fix is applied')
sendPrompt('/check: reviews diff, auto-fixes safe issues, verifies with evidence before claiming done')
sendPrompt('/read: fetches any URL or PDF as clean Markdown via proxy cascade')
sendPrompt('/write: enforces natural style for Chinese and English, strips AI writing patterns')
sendPrompt('/learn: six-phase research - collect, digest, outline, draft, refine, publish')
sendPrompt('/health: audits CLAUDE.md, rules, skills, hooks, MCP, behavior')
